speech_not_understood.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, samajh nahi aaya. Kripya dobara bataiye.
speech_not_understood.en-IN: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you please repeat?

service_unavailable.hi-IN: Abhi ye service available nahi hai. Kripya thodi der baad try karein.
service_unavailable.en-IN: This service is currently unavailable. Please try again shortly.

otp_sent.hi-IN: Aapke phone par OTP bheja gaya hai. Kripya OTP bataiye.
otp_sent.en-IN: An OTP has been sent to your phone. Please tell me the OTP.

otp_wrong.hi-IN: Ye OTP galat hai. Kripya dobara bataiye.
otp_wrong.en-IN: That OTP is incorrect. Please try again.

otp_expired.hi-IN: OTP expire ho gaya hai. Kya naya OTP bhejein?
otp_expired.en-IN: Your OTP has expired. Shall I send a new one?

otp_max_attempts.hi-IN: Bahut zyada galat attempts ho gaye. Kripya baad mein call karein.
otp_max_attempts.en-IN: Too many incorrect attempts. Please call back later.

general_error.hi-IN: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Kripya thodi der baad dobara call karein.
general_error.en-IN: Something went wrong. Please call back in a few minutes.

timeout.hi-IN: Lagta hai aap busy hain. Aap kisi bhi samay dobara call kar sakte hain. Dhanyavaad!
timeout.en-IN: It seems you're busy. You can call back anytime. Thank you!
